title: Discovered: /docs (301)
description: Public path /docs returned HTTP 301
evidence:
URL: http://127.0.0.1:8081//docs
Status: 301
Size: 312 bytes
Content-Type: text/html; charset=iso-8859-1
Location: http://127.0.0.1:8081/docs/

description: Sensitive path /.htaccess returned HTTP 403
evidence:

Status: 403
Size: 295 bytes
Content-Type: text/html; charset=iso-8859-1
Location: n/a

title: Discovered: /robots.txt (200)
description: Interesting path /robots.txt returned HTTP 200
evidence:
URL: http://127.0.0.1:8081//robots.txt
Status: 200
Size: 26 bytes
Content-Type: text/plain
Location: n/a

title: Discovered: /config (301)
description: Sensitive path /config returned HTTP 301
evidence:
URL: http://127.0.0.1:8081//config
Status: 301
Size: 314 bytes
Content-Type: text/html; charset=iso-8859-1
Location: http://127.0.0.1:8081/config/

title: Missing Security Header: X-Content-Type-Options
description: X-Content-Type-Options header is missing. Browsers may MIME-sniff the response body, potentially executing untrusted content as an unexpected type.
evidence: Header 'X-Content-Type-Options' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8081/
remediation: Add 'X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff' to all responses.

title: Missing Security Header: X-Frame-Options
description: X-Frame-Options header is missing. The page can be embedded in iframes, enabling clickjacking attacks.
evidence: Header 'X-Frame-Options' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8081/
remediation: Add 'X-Frame-Options: DENY' or 'X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN'. Consider also using CSP frame-ancestors directive.

title: Missing Security Header: Content-Security-Policy
description: Content-Security-Policy header is missing. Without CSP, the application is more vulnerable to XSS and data injection attacks.
evidence: Header 'Content-Security-Policy' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8081/
remediation: Implement a Content-Security-Policy header with restrictive directives. Start with 'Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'' and refine as needed.

title: Missing Security Header: Referrer-Policy
description: Referrer-Policy header is missing. Sensitive information in URLs may leak via the Referer header to third-party sites.
evidence: Header 'Referrer-Policy' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8081/
remediation: Add 'Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin' or 'Referrer-Policy: no-referrer' depending on requirements.

title: Missing Security Header: Permissions-Policy
description: Permissions-Policy header is missing. Browser features like camera, microphone, and geolocation are not explicitly restricted.
evidence: Header 'Permissions-Policy' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8081/
remediation: Add a Permissions-Policy header restricting unused browser features, e.g., 'Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()'.

title: Information Disclosure: Server
description: The Server header reveals web server software and potentially its version. This aids attackers in fingerprinting the target.
evidence: Server: Apache/2.4.25 (Debian)
remediation: Remove or genericize the Server header in your web server configuration.

title: No TLS — target uses plain HTTP
description: The target is using plain HTTP without TLS encryption.
evidence: Scheme: http, Host: 127.0.0.1, Port: 8081
remediation: Enable HTTPS with a valid TLS certificate. Redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS.

title: Missing Security Header: X-Content-Type-Options
description: X-Content-Type-Options header is missing. Browsers may MIME-sniff the response body, potentially executing untrusted content as an unexpected type.
evidence: Header 'X-Content-Type-Options' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8081/instructions.php
remediation: Add 'X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff' to all responses.

title: Missing Security Header: X-Frame-Options
description: X-Frame-Options header is missing. The page can be embedded in iframes, enabling clickjacking attacks.
evidence: Header 'X-Frame-Options' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8081/instructions.php
remediation: Add 'X-Frame-Options: DENY' or 'X-Frame-Options: SAMEORIGIN'. Consider also using CSP frame-ancestors directive.

description: Content-Security-Policy header is missing. Without CSP, the application is more vulnerable to XSS and data injection attacks.
evidence: Header 'Content-Security-Policy' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8081/instructions.php
remediation: Implement a Content-Security-Policy header with restrictive directives. Start with 'Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'' and refine as needed.

description: Referrer-Policy header is missing. Sensitive information in URLs may leak via the Referer header to third-party sites.
evidence: Header 'Referrer-Policy' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8081/instructions.php
remediation: Add 'Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin' or 'Referrer-Policy: no-referrer' depending on requirements.

title: Reflected XSS in parameter 'name'
description: The parameter 'name' reflects user input without encoding, allowing script injection.
evidence:
URL: http://127.0.0.1:8081/vulnerabilities/xss_r/?name=%3Cscript%3Ealert%28%22n1GhT0wL%22%29%3C%2Fscript%3E
Payload: <script>alert("n1GhT0wL")</script>
Payload reflected unescaped in executable HTML context.
remediation: Implement output encoding (HTML entity escaping) on all user-controlled values. Deploy a strict Content-Security-Policy.

description: X-Content-Type-Options header is missing. Browsers may MIME-sniff the response body, potentially executing untrusted content as an unexpected type.

remediation: Add 'X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff' to all responses.

title: SQL Injection (Error-Based) in 'id'
description: The parameter 'id' appears vulnerable to error-based SQL injection. A MySQL error message was returned when injecting a crafted payload.
evidence:
URL: http://127.0.0.1:8081/vulnerabilities/sqli/?id=%27&Submit=Submit
Payload: '
DBMS: MySQL
Error pattern: you have an error in your sql syntax
Status: 200
remediation: Use parameterized queries (prepared statements) for all database interactions. Never concatenate user input into SQL strings. Apply input validation and use an ORM where possible.

title: Missing Security Header: X-Content-Type-Options
description: X-Content-Type-Options header is missing. Browsers may MIME-sniff the response body, potentially executing untrusted content as an unexpected type.
evidence: Header 'X-Content-Type-Options' absent in response from http://127.0.0.1:8081/robots.txt
remediation: Add 'X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff' to all responses.
